title: Gangsterzy i filantropi
writer: Bohdan Czeszko, Jerzy Hoffman, Edward Skórzewski
actors: Gustaw Holoubek, Wieslaw Michnikowski, Hanka Bielicka
plot: A criminal mastermind responsible for a failed robbery and an accidental petty conman meet inside a prison carriage. Soon they are both going to hear the court verdict.
